title: ✅ Present Simple
text: I/you/we/they work; he/she/it works. Uso: abitudini e fatti. Errore: she like ❌ → she likes ✅

title: 🔄 Present Continuous
text: am/is/are + verb-ing. Uso: azioni ora o temporanee. I am studying English.

title: ⏪ Past Simple
text: Verbo regolare -ed o irregolare. Yesterday I went. Errore: Yesterday I go ❌

title: 🎬 Past Continuous
text: was/were + verb-ing. While I was walking, it started to rain.

title: 🏁 Present Perfect
text: have/has + participio. I have visited London. Errore: I have went ❌ → I have gone ✅

title: 🔮 Future
text: will + verbo base; be going to per intenzioni/programmi.

title: 🧩 Conditionals
text: First: If it rains, I will stay home. Second: If I were you, I would study.

title: 📈 Comparatives/Superlatives
text: bigger, more interesting, the best, the most beautiful.

title: 🧱 Articles
text: a/an per singolare generico; the per specifico.

title: 📍 Prepositions
text: arrive in a city/country; arrive at a place; interested in; good at.

title: ⚖️ Too/Enough
text: too expensive = troppo caro; good enough = abbastanza buono.

title: 🔗 Relative pronouns
text: who per persone, which per cose, that per persone/cose.

title: 🧵 Linking words
text: because, so, but, although, however, when, while, before, after, in the end.
